candidate.objective: Highly skilled and experienced All-Round Poly Welder and Leading Hand with over 17 years in pipeline fabrication, installation, and civil operations. Proficient in all forms of polyethylene welding including butt fusion, electrofusion, extrusion, and socket welding. Experienced in instrument installation and maintenance, excavator operations, dewatering, and managing workgroups as Leading Hand. Holds a broad range of tickets including HRWL (Dogger), LF (Forklift), gas testing, working at heights, chainsaw, and White Card. Inducted with Rio Tinto, BHP, and FMG. Available immediately.

duties: Polyethylene welding of new pipeline systems on mining and civil infrastructure projects.
Maintenance of existing pipelines, including fault identification and repair.
Instrument installation and ongoing maintenance associated with pipeline works.
Civil operations in support of pipeline installation activities.
Dewatering operations across project work fronts.
Management of workgroup activities and personnel as Leading Hand.
Carried out leading hand duties including planning, coordinating crew tasks, and liaising with supervision.
Polyethylene welding of new pipeline systems.
Maintenance of existing pipelines.
Instrument installation and maintenance.
Civil operations supporting pipeline works.
Dewatering operations.
Management of workgroup as Leading Hand.
Carried out leading hand coordination and supervisory duties.
Performed extrusion welding, socket welding, electrofusion welding, and butt fusion welding of polyethylene pipelines.
Carried out hydro testing of completed pipeline systems to verify integrity.
Fabricated HDPE components and assemblies in workshop and site environments.
Conducted on-site installation and field work for Rio Tinto — inducted for site access.
Operated forklift for materials handling in workshop and yard environments.
Acted as Leading Hand on relevant project works.
Note: Includes a second period January 2021 – October 2021 following gap in service.
Performed butt fusion welding, extrusion welding, and electrofusion welding of polyethylene pipelines.
Carried out pipe bending operations.
Operated forklift for materials movement.
Operated granulator equipment.
Maintained machinery and equipment to ensure operational readiness.
Performed plastic welding operations.
Operated forklift for materials handling.

employment.employer: D.M. Civil Drainage & Construction Pty Ltd
duties: Performed pipe laying for stormwater, water mains, and sewage infrastructure.
Carried out precast installation works.
Cored manholes ranging from 50mm to 600mm.
Performed polyethylene welding operations.
Maintained equipment and ensured operational readiness.
Operated excavator for civil drainage and construction activities.

skills.detail: Expert in all forms of poly welding: butt fusion, electrofusion, extrusion, socket, and hydro testing. Over 17 years of experience across fabrication, installation, and field maintenance environments.
Experienced Leading Hand managing workgroups on mining and civil pipeline projects. Responsible for crew coordination, planning, task allocation, and liaison with supervision.
Experienced in instrument installation and maintenance, dewatering, excavator operations, and civil works associated with pipeline and drainage infrastructure.
Competent excavator operator with civil drainage and construction experience. Holds Forklift Licence (LF) and HRWL Dogger ticket.
White Card holder. Inducted with Rio Tinto, BHP, and FMG. Holds gas testing, working at heights, and chainsaw tickets.

certifications.details: Polyethylene pipeline welding — butt fusion, electrofusion, extrusion, and socket welding
Excavator operations — civil construction and drainage

referees: Professional references available upon request. Please contact ACM Resources to facilitate introduction.
